description: Detroit's official "Inside the D" blog as a CLI — every article searchable offline, sliced across category and neighborhood at once, with related-reads and exports the website can't produce.

novel_features.name: Cross-axis filter (category × neighborhood × date)
novel_features.description: Filter Detroit articles by category AND neighborhood AND date window in one query — the slice the website's single-facet search can't express.

novel_features.name: Related reads
novel_features.description: Find the articles that share the most categories and neighborhoods with a given post, ranked.

novel_features.name: Coverage map (category × neighborhood cross-tab)
novel_features.description: Cross-tabulate article counts across every category and every neighborhood to see where coverage is dense or thin.

novel_features.name: Reading list export
novel_features.description: Materialize an ordered, deduped reading list (markdown/json/csv) from any filter to a file — with an option to drop sponsored posts for a neutral handout.
